title: ProofVault Trust Case v1.0.1
subtitle: Release-bound trust evidence for an offline-first encrypted evidence app
summary: A reproducible trust case with a pinned specimen, drift detection, verifier coverage, and a hosted-green release path.
description: ProofVault turns trust claims into inspectable release evidence: bounded guarantees, a pinned specimen, regeneration and drift checks, and public provenance tied to an exact hosted-green non-debug commit.
